notes: refresh_unity was used with forced all-assets refresh and script compilation.
Executed menu item Escape From Nightmares/Seed Interactable Hotspot Prefab.
Unity console confirmed: Seeded InteractableHotspot prefab.
Unity MCP prefab hierarchy inspection found one root object with RectTransform, CanvasRenderer, Image, and InteractableHotspot components.

findings.detail: Prefab root has RectTransform, CanvasRenderer, transparent Image, and InteractableHotspot components.
Image color alpha is 0 and raycast target is enabled.
InteractableHotspot has raycastImage assigned; definition and interactionSystem are intentionally unassigned on the reusable prefab.
InteractableHotspot exposes ApplyHitArea(Rect) and Configure(InteractableDefinition, InteractionSystem) for future room-specific placement.
Static scan found no missing script markers in InteractableHotspot.prefab or Stage1.unity.

known_gaps: Room-specific hotspot instances are not placed in this unit.
InteractableDefinition assets and precise hit areas are not seeded in this unit.
Screen-edge hotspot, hide spot, monster overlay, and audio emitter gameplay prefabs are still incomplete.
